title: neottia borealis
intro: Neottia borealis, also known as the northern green orchid or northern pogonia, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family that is native to the boreal forests of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Neottia borealis include its ability to reduce swelling, promote wound healing, and alleviate pain, making it a popular herbal remedy among indigenous communities. Neottia borealis can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be applied topically or taken internally under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
